rationale: Both evaluations scored the candidate 3/10 with substantively identical reasoning: insufficient C++ experience versus the 8-year requirement, and a skill set skewed toward full-stack/web/DLang rather than low-level cloud compute infrastructure. The only differences (7 months vs ~6 months of C++, reworded strengths) are within ordinary run-to-run noise and reworded phrasing. Nothing in the variant keys off the Brazil location or treats the candidate's nationality as job-relevant.
